creator: charlz_klug@mail.ru
text:
/usr/ports/sysutils/mgeupsd works not correctly. By "man mgeupsd" this software must report about lost connection with UPS every minute, but he not works. Mgeupsd build and runs without any errors, but not working. My UPS: MGE Pulsar M 2200.

How-To-Repeat: Just use mgeupsd.
